Title: Marabottini, Alessandro
Overview: Raphael scholar. He studied under Mario Salmi and became his assistant professor. During these years he shared a flat in Rome with the young Luigi Salerno.
Sources: Julier, Insley. [finding aid for] Luigi Salerno research papers, 1948-1996. Getty Research Center. http://hdl.handle.net/10020/cifa2000m26.
